title: Giant Palm Tree
description: This simple mod adds a giant Palm Tree to the Beach Biome.
body:
### Giant Palm Tree

**This simple mod adds a giant Palm Tree to the Beach Biome.**
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/faca4a6751e2f1a6001e83caeffc6173e2e67303.jpeg)



- The terrain around the palm tree is designed to blend naturally with the beach biome.
- Perfect spot to build a cozy beach base nearby
  
This mod is also part of the combined ''Giant Natural Additions'' mod.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
